mnemonics.title: Phases of a Compiler
mnemonics.content:
**L**azy **S**ophie **S**ells **I**tchy **C**arrots **C**heerfully
(Lexical, Syntax, Semantic, Intermediate code, Code Optimization, Code Generation)

mnemonics.title: Front End vs. Back End
mnemonics.content:
Front End: **A**nalyzes the **S**ource. (Analysis, Source Language)
Back End: **S**ynthesizes for the **T**arget. (Synthesis, Target Machine)
